# Captains Fish and Chicken
> Fresh-to-order fried fish, chicken & seafood in Cedar Rapids

## NAP
- Name: Captains Fish and Chicken
- Address: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
- Phone: (319) 221-1040
- Email: hello@captainsfishandchicken.com

## Hours
Mon-Thu 11am-10pm | Fri-Sat 11am-11pm | Sun 11am-8pm

## Domain
https://captainsfishandchicken.com

## Description
Captains Fish and Chicken is a locally owned counter-service restaurant on 1st Ave NE in Cedar Rapids, serving fried fish, chicken and seafood made fresh to order. The menu spans catfish, perch, tilapia, cod, red snapper, calamari, crab cakes and jumbo shrimp alongside whole, party and boneless wings, chicken tenders and gizzards, with generous family and party deals. Owner Ray Aqel opened the 1st Ave NE location in October 2024.

## Owner
Ray Aqel

## Payment Accepted
Cash, Visa, Mastercard, Debit

## Year Established
2024
